items.question: What is the main purpose of wrapping preprocessing in a sklearn Pipeline?
options: Speed up pandas operations
Apply the same ordered transforms at fit and predict with train-only statistics
Replace the need for train/test split
Convert DataFrames to SQL tables
items.answer: Apply the same ordered transforms at fit and predict with train-only statistics
items.explanation: Pipeline.fit learns transformer parameters on training rows; predict replays the chain without refitting, keeping evaluation and deployment consistent.

items.question: In a numeric ColumnTransformer branch, which order is correct?
options: StandardScaler → SimpleImputer
SimpleImputer → StandardScaler
OneHotEncoder → StandardScaler
StandardScaler only, no imputer
items.explanation: Imputation produces finite values; the scaler then learns mean and variance on complete training columns.

items.question: You scaled the full dataset before train_test_split. What went wrong?
options: StandardScaler cannot run on pandas DataFrames
Holdout rows influenced scaler statistics—preprocessing leakage
Pipeline objects cannot include StandardScaler
Nothing; this is the recommended approach
items.answer: Holdout rows influenced scaler statistics—preprocessing leakage
items.explanation: Scaler mean and variance must be fit on training data only; fitting on train+test leaks holdout information into preprocessing.

items.question: Why save the full Pipeline to joblib instead of only the classifier?
options: joblib cannot serialize classifiers
The fitted imputer, encoder, and scaler parameters must ship with the model
Pipelines train faster than standalone models
ColumnTransformer requires joblib format
items.answer: The fitted imputer, encoder, and scaler parameters must ship with the model
items.explanation: Production rows need the same transforms the model saw during training; the artifact must include all fitted preprocessing steps.

items.question: ColumnTransformer is most appropriate when:
options: All columns are identical floating-point features
Numeric and categorical columns need different preprocessing branches
You only use decision trees on raw data
You want to drop all categorical columns
items.answer: Numeric and categorical columns need different preprocessing branches
items.explanation: ColumnTransformer applies separate mini-pipelines per column subset and stacks the results for one estimator.
